title: HawkPack
description: Highly optimized and highly customizable QOL modpack for fabric
body:
**HawkPack**

A highly optimized and highly customizable QOL modpack for Fabric, with some pvp elements. Some of these include
- Armor HUD
- Inventory HUD
- Custom effects HUD

This modpack is intended to be run client-side and is allowed on most public servers, but be sure to check the server rules.

In order to get better performance out of this modpack, make sure that in your modrinth settings, the allocated memory is set to the max.
